top_signals.title: New Zealand House Prices Near Three-Year Low on Iran War Worries
top_signals.summary: New Zealand house prices fell for the third straight month in June, nearing a three-year low and adding to signs of an economic slowdown as the global oil shock hits household incomes and consumer confidence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Muted as Traders Weigh Warsh Remarks, Manufacturing
top_signals.summary: US stocks pared earlier losses as fresh economic data painted a picture of resilience, while traders assessed commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years
top_signals.summary:
A source familiar with the 96-year-old company said he is unsure whether CFL will file Chapter 7 or “liquidate outside of bankruptcy,” but that the LTL carrier has no plans to reorganize.

top_signals.title: Tankmaker KNDS Postpones Its IPO Citing Market Conditions
top_signals.summary: Tankmaker KNDS intends to resume its initial public offering process when market conditions improve, according to a Wednesday statement, postponing what was set to be one of Europe’s largest debuts in recent years.
